What We Offer

Expert Care for
Every Garment

From everyday laundry to delicate fabrics, we handle every piece with professional precision and eco-friendly methods.

01
👔

Drycleaning

Professional dry cleaning for suits, gowns, native attire, and delicate fabrics using industry-grade cleaning technology.

02
👗

Laundry & Pressing

Full wash, dry, and iron service. Your clothes returned neatly pressed, fresh, and perfectly folded.

03
🚚

Pickup & Delivery

Schedule a convenient pickup and we'll deliver your freshly cleaned items right back to your doorstep.

Our Process

Simple. Seamless. Spotless.

01

Schedule Pickup

Contact us via WhatsApp or call to arrange a convenient pickup time from your home or office.

02

We Collect

Our team arrives at your location and carefully collects your garments for processing.

03

Expert Cleaning

We clean, press, and hand-finish each garment with meticulous care and attention to detail.

04

Swift Delivery

Your clothes are packaged beautifully and delivered back to you on time, every time.

100% Satisfaction
Guaranteed
About Us

Lagos' Trusted Name in Premium Garment Care

At Iseoluwa Drycleaning Service, we are passionate about keeping your wardrobe in its best condition. Based in Igando, Lagos, we serve residential and corporate clients across the city with a commitment to quality and reliability.

  • Professional-grade equipment & eco-friendly products
  • Experienced, uniformed and trusted staff
  • Convenient doorstep pickup & delivery
  • Safe handling of all fabric types including native attire
  • Affordable pricing with premium results
Get In Touch →
